MINISTRY OF WOMEN AND CHILD DEVELOPMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi,the 9th November,2012 S.O. 2705(E).-In exercise ofthe powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section (1) of the Protection of ehildrenfTOmSexualOffencesAct, 2012 (No.32 of2012), the Central Government hereby appoints the 14th November,2012, as the date on which thenrovisions ofthe said Act shall come into force. [No. 22-14/20 12-CW-I] Dr. VIVEK JOSHI, Jt. Secy.
